title: Rule headline overrides
description: Plain-language overrides for tool-native rule output. Lookup key in `rules` is `<test>:<rule_id>` (where `test` is the test identifier — alfa, axe, pa11y, lint, etc.). The unified report shell uses these overrides to render site-builder-friendly headlines, impact categories, and fix hints; tool-native messages remain available in the technical detail block on each finding.

_comment.description: Free-form note for maintainers; ignored by consumers.

impact_category.description: User-facing axis used to group findings in the unified report.

severity.description: Optional severity override when the tool's native severity doesn't match the user-impact tier.

tags.description: Per-finding tags attached to every emitted finding for this rule (e.g. ['wai-aria'] for ARIA-targeted rules). Used by the report shell for fine-grained filter chips.
